hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: Creating Beautiful Spaces,
hero.subtitle: We believe that custom curtains are more than just window coverings—they are the finishing touch that transforms a house into a home.

brandStory.label: Our Heritage
brandStory.title: Crafted with Passion, Designed for You
brandStory.subtitle: Since 2015, we've been transforming windows into works of art
brandStory.description: DrapeStyle began with a simple belief: every window deserves curtains as unique as the home it adorns. Founded in Los Angeles by a team of interior designers and master craftsmen, we set out to revolutionize the custom curtain industry by combining traditional tailoring techniques with modern design sensibilities.
brandStory.secondParagraph: What started as a small workshop has grown into a trusted name in American homes, serving thousands of families who share our passion for quality and personalized style. Every curtain we create is a testament to our commitment to excellence and our love for beautiful living spaces.

craftsmanship.label: Our Process
craftsmanship.title: The Art of Custom Curtains
craftsmanship.subtitle: Every curtain we create goes through a meticulous four-step process, ensuring the highest quality and perfect fit for your windows.

steps.title: Premium Selection
steps.description: We source only the finest fabrics from certified mills around the world, ensuring every material meets our rigorous quality standards.

steps.title: Precision Cutting
steps.description: Each panel is measured and cut with computer-guided precision to ensure perfect dimensions for your custom order.

steps.title: Expert Sewing
steps.description: Our master seamstresses bring decades of experience, crafting each curtain with meticulous attention to detail and finishing.

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.description: Every piece undergoes rigorous quality control checks before carefully packaging for safe delivery to your home.

qualityPromises.label: Our Promise
qualityPromises.title: Quality You Can Trust
qualityPromises.subtitle: We stand behind every curtain we create with comprehensive guarantees designed to give you complete peace of mind.

promises.title: Lifetime Quality Guarantee
promises.description: We stand behind every curtain with our comprehensive quality guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right.

promises.title: On-Time Delivery Promise
promises.description: We understand the excitement of home transformation. Your custom curtains will arrive within the promised timeframe, guaranteed.

promises.title: 5-Year Warranty
promises.description: Every curtain comes with our exclusive 5-year warranty covering craftsmanship and hardware, giving you peace of mind.

promises.title: 30-Day Free Returns
promises.description: Changed your mind? No problem. We offer hassle-free returns within 30 days of delivery, no questions asked.

testimonials.label: Customer Love
testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it—hear from the thousands of happy homeowners who've transformed their spaces with DrapeStyle.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.text: The quality exceeded my expectations. These curtains transformed my living room completely. The custom fit is perfect!

items.name: Michael Chen
items.text: From fabric selection to installation, the entire process was seamless. The blackout curtains are exactly what we needed.

items.name: Emily Rodriguez
items.text: I've ordered from DrapeStyle three times now. Each experience has been wonderful. The customer service is outstanding!

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our products or services? Our friendly team is here to help you find the perfect curtains for your home.
